description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators.

policies.details: No refunds are provided after 7 days of purchase.
24/7 support is available exclusively for Pro plan subscribers. Basic plan users get email support only.
AutoStream offers a 7-day free trial for new users on the Pro plan.
All plans are billed monthly. You can cancel anytime before the next billing cycle.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports content creators on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other major platforms.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade from Basic to Pro at any time. The price difference will be prorated for the remaining days in your billing cycle.

faqs.question: Does AutoStream support team collaboration?
faqs.answer: Team collaboration features are available on the Pro plan.

faqs.question: What video formats does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV input formats. Output is available in MP4 and MOV.
